nasb.text: And the earth will respond to the grain, to the new wine and to the oil, And they will respond to Jezreel.

esv.text: and the earth shall answer the grain, the wine, and the oil, and they shall answer Jezreel,

cnv.text: 地必應允五穀、新酒和油。 這些必應允耶斯列。

ccb.text: 地要应允五谷、新酒和油的祈求， 五谷、新酒和油要应允耶斯列的祈求。
